description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 20 cm Width: 23 cm Depth: 12 cm Two-tone leatherette upper Two short handles A flap with a magnetic closure to secure the main compartment with crystal, rivet and metal embellishments Fabric inner with a zippered separator and a zippered pocket A buttonable tab to reduce or increase the size of the bag Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
